/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -ansi -pedantic -Wall -Wextra -O3 -mpopcnt -mbmi2 -msse4.2 -mavx2 -DBMI -DDEBUG -flto   CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/attack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/bit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/eval.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/gen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/learn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/libmy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/math.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/move.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/nn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/hand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/pos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/score.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/sfen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/sort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/selfplay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/tt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/uct.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_shogi.dir/var.cpp.o  -o cpp_shogi -Wl,-rpath,/home/tugajin/libtorch/lib:/usr/local/cuda/lib64/stubs:/usr/local/cuda/lib64 /home/tugajin/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so /home/tugajin/libtorch/lib/libc10.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/stubs/libcuda.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libnvrtc.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libnvToolsExt.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so /home/tugajin/libtorch/lib/libc10_cuda.so -lpthread /home/tugajin/libtorch/lib/libc10_cuda.so /home/tugajin/libtorch/lib/libc10.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcufft.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcurand.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcublas.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudnn.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,/home/tugajin/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so -Wl,--as-needed /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so
